positive_reviews: The cool mint flavor is wonderful and really does taste very good. It has a very cool minty flavor that makes it a joy to take. People who are used to taking things like zantac and have taken it for a long time like me are weary of trying new things that might come out like I was. Don't be it has an awesome flavor and it actually makes swallowing a much more pleasant much easier experience. You now don't have to taste it when putting it in your mouth you just have this wonderful mint flavor. I had absolutely no physical change in response to the cool mint flavor whatsoever. it did what zantac always does work incredibly well. I will be buying cool mint flavor zantac and only cool mint flavor zantac from now on. It was packaged perfectly and I received it a week earlier than expected awesome product awesome!!!!!!! Awesome seller awesome!!!!!! Thank you for an amazing experience thank you!!!!!!!

Decided to give them a try and worked great so I decided to get more to not be near running out anytime soon. I usually only take 1 time in the day, prior to evening time and I feel good throughout the night and no issues to sleep nor issues of heartburn at wakeup. Buying with a discount was a an awesome buy to keep myself away from heartburns

These work as they're supposed to as far as I can tell. You can't really taste the mint, but you can smell it when you open the bottle...which kind of makes me want to chew them like a mint lol, but I haven't actually done that.

I suffer from GERD. Tried different medications and non seem to work well. These have been amazing. Can't say enough of how well they work. Highly recommend to anyone who suffers from heartburn. Really works in 15 min or less. Glad I found these.

It can be hard to find the mint flavor in stores sometimes so love that I can easily order here. Not sure if the formula is even different than the regular one but I swear it works better and quicker!

This ZANTAC 360 is old medicine. This package expires in a month and a half. The shelf life is usually 2 to 3 years ahead. The expiration date would typically be 2027 or 2028 which means this medicine has been sitting around, somewhere for at least a couple of years.
BUYER BEWARE!! The expiration date on this medication was 15 days after it was delivered. It can't be returned. I'm stuck with an expensive product that I can't use.

positive_reviews: Be sure to give it 30 - 40 minutes to kick in and reduce the discomfort if you are in a reactive situation and be sure not to lay down. You need to sit upright to have it do the task at hand as quickly as possible. I would say that it is always best to be protective and take two right before or after dinner but well before bedtime. Again, stay sitting up for 30-60 Minutes is what I have found is the best practice.
It has worked for me. I take one per day or every other day. I take it wherever I go. Before and during meal throughout the day, I drink sips of water.
This is a lifesaver. If I don't have it, it gets so bad I throw up. Can't go a day without it.
